title: Quick-Fix Flaky Pepper Crumble
description: A floral and flaky Brazilian dish featuring roasted bell peppers as the star ingredient, egg-free-friendly for a quick-fix meal.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste
ingredients.notes: Use sea salt for a healthier option.

instructions: Remove the stem, seeds, and white membrane from the bell pepper. Remove any tough parts.
Squeeze the juice of two limes into a bowl. Add the removed bell pepper pieces and chopped parsley leaves.
Mix well with salt and black pepper to taste. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
Taste test for balance and adjust seasonings as needed. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
